description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Estimate the cost of a standard uncontested divorce in California under $2,000
tasks.description: Use the Family Law section and fee calculator to find the estimated cost for a standard uncontested divorce in California with no minor children and no contested property, ensuring the maximum budget entered is $2,000.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Practice Areas."
In the practice areas list, click on "Family Law."
On the Family Law page, click the "Uncontested Divorce" service card or link.
Scroll down until you see the "Estimate Your Fees" or similar calculator section and click the "Start Estimate" button.
In the "State" dropdown within the calculator, select "California."
In the "Children" options, select the choice labeled "No minor children."
In the "Property Division" or "Complexity" dropdown, select the option that indicates "No contested property" or "Standard case."
In the "Maximum Budget" or "Budget" input field, type "2000" and click the button labeled "Calculate Estimate" or "Get Estimate."

tasks.name: Book a free 20-minute phone consultation with an employment lawyer under $250/hour
tasks.description: Use the consultation booking system to schedule a free 20-minute phone consultation with an employment lawyer who has at least a 4.5-star rating and a maximum hourly rate of $250, choosing the earliest available Monday time slot between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the header button or menu item labeled "Book Consultation" or "Schedule a Consultation."

In the filters panel on the consultation booking page, set the Practice Area to "Employment Law," Consultation Type to "Phone," and Consultation Length or Fee to "Free 20-minute consultation" if available.
In the same filters panel, set the maximum hourly rate slider or field to "$250" and set the minimum rating filter to "4.5 stars" or higher.
Click the "Apply Filters" or equivalent button to update the list of available lawyers.
From the filtered results, click on the first lawyer card in the list to open their availability or booking page.
On the calendar widget, select the first Monday date that appears and then choose the earliest available time slot between 10:00 AM and 12:00 PM.
On the booking form, type "Alex Johnson" in the Full Name field, "555-123-4567" in the Phone field, and "alex@example.com" in the Email field.
Click the button labeled "Confirm Booking," "Schedule Appointment," or similar to finalize the consultation request.

tasks.name: Compare the first two business lawyers in Chicago and save the more experienced one
tasks.description: Find business lawyers in the Chicago office, compare the first two profiles in the list by years of experience, and add the lawyer with more years of experience (and an hourly rate shown on their profile) to your shortlist.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the menu item labeled "Our Lawyers" or "Attorneys."
On the lawyers listing page, set the Practice Area filter to "Business Law" and the Office Location filter to "Chicago."
Use the sort dropdown to sort the results by "Hourly Rate: Low to High" if such an option is available.
Open the profile of the first lawyer in the list in a new tab or page by clicking their name or profile card.
Return to the lawyers list and open the profile of the second lawyer in the list in another new tab or page.
Compare the "Years of Experience" values shown on the two profiles and determine which lawyer has the higher number of years.
On the profile of the lawyer with more years of experience, click the button or icon labeled "Add to Shortlist," "Save Lawyer," or similar to save that lawyer.

tasks.name: Find and save a recent article on non-compete agreements in Employment Law
tasks.description: Locate an article about non-compete agreements in the Employment Law topic that was published within the last 12 months and add it to your saved articles or reading list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled "Resources," "Insights," or "Blog."
On the resources or articles page, click on the tab or section labeled "Articles" or "Blog Posts" if there are multiple content types.
In the search field on the articles page, type "non-compete agreement" and press Enter or click the search icon.
Use the topic or category filter to select "Employment Law" as the topic.
Use the date or time filter to select content from the "Last 12 months" or a similar recent timeframe.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the search results by "Most Recent" or "Newest First."
Click on the first article in the result list.
On the article page, click the "Save Article," "Bookmark," or "Add to Reading List" button or icon to save the article.

tasks.name: Build an estate planning package with three specific documents that stays at or below $1,000
tasks.description: Create a customized estate planning package that includes a Last Will, a Durable Power of Attorney, and an Advance Healthcare Directive for an individual in Texas, adjusting options if necessary so that the total package price shown does not exceed $1,000, then proceed to the package summary page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Services" or "Practice Areas" and select "Estate Planning" from the list.
On the Estate Planning page, click the button labeled "Customize Your Package" or "Build a Plan."
In the package builder, select the checkboxes for "Last Will," "Durable Power of Attorney," and "Advance Healthcare Directive."
Set the Client Type option to "Individual" and choose "Texas" from the State dropdown field.

If the total package price displayed exceeds $1,000, adjust the options by deselecting any optional add-on items or changing to a lower-tier option until the displayed total is at or below $1,000 while still including the three specified documents.
Click the button labeled "Continue," "Review Package," or similar to move to the summary or review screen.
On the package summary page, click the button labeled "Save Package Quote," "Proceed Without Payment," or similar to store or advance the quote without completing payment.

tasks.name: Submit a contact inquiry for a New York tenant with a $3,500 landlord-tenant dispute
tasks.description: Use the contact form to submit a landlord-tenant dispute inquiry as a tenant in New York with a dispute amount of $3,500, specifying email as the preferred contact method and including a short description of the issue.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation link labeled "Contact," "Contact Us," or similar.
On the contact page, in the "Type of Issue" dropdown, select "Landlord-Tenant Dispute" or the closest matching option.
In the "Your Role" field, select the radio button or option labeled "Tenant."
In the field or slider for "Dispute Amount" or "Amount in Dispute," enter "3500" as the amount in dollars.
In the location or state dropdown, select "New York."
In the Full Name field, type "Jamie Rivera"; in the Email field, type "jamie@example.com"; and in the Phone field, type "555-987-6543."
In the message or description text area, type a brief description such as "My landlord is withholding my $3,500 security deposit without explanation."
In the "Preferred Contact Method" options, select "Email."
Click the "Submit Inquiry," "Send Message," or equivalent button to send the contact request.

tasks.name: Find the nearest office within 10 miles of ZIP 94103 that is open on weekends and view directions
tasks.description: Use the office locator to find an office within 10 miles of ZIP code 94103 that has weekend hours, select the nearest one, and open its directions page.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Locations," "Offices," or similar.
On the locations page, type "94103" into the ZIP Code or Address search field and submit the search.
Set the distance filter or radius selector to "Within 10 miles" or the closest matching option.
In the filters section, check the box or option labeled "Weekend Hours," "Open Saturdays," or similar to show offices open on weekends.
Use the sort dropdown to sort the office results by "Distance: Nearest First" if available.
Click on the first office card in the filtered and sorted results list to open its detail page.
On the office detail page, click the "View Directions," "Get Directions," or similar link or button.
If a dedicated directions page or panel appears, click the "Print Directions" or "Expand Directions" link or button to fully open the directions view.

tasks.name: Generate a preview of a mutual NDA using the online document generator
tasks.description: Use the NDA generator tool to create a mutual non-disclosure agreement between BrightApps LLC and DataCore Inc., governed by California law with a 3-year term, including a non-solicitation clause, and generate the document preview.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the menu item labeled "Legal Tools," "Self-Help," or similar, and then select "Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) Generator" from the available tools.
On the NDA generator start screen, select the option labeled "Mutual NDA" or "Both parties share confidential information."
In the field for "Party 1" or "Disclosing Party," type "BrightApps LLC."
In the field for "Party 2" or "Receiving Party," type "DataCore Inc."
In the "Governing Law" dropdown, select "California."
In the term or duration field, enter "3 years" as the length of the confidentiality obligation.
Check the checkbox or toggle labeled "Include Non-Solicitation Clause" or similar.
Click the button labeled "Generate Document Preview," "Create Preview," or equivalent to produce the NDA preview page.
